column1:
' Will you be at the party?' Richard asked me. 

Richard asked me if I____________be at the party.

'May I ask you a few questions?' the woman asked Ted.

The woman asked Ted if she_____________ask him a few questions.

'Can we go to the zoo tomorrow?' Jane asked her father. 

Jane asked her father if they__________go to the zoo the following day.

'Shall I study maths or English?' Sally asked her best friend. 

Sally asked her best friend whether she__________study maths or English.

'Can you write with your left hand?' Val asked me.

Val asked me whether I____________write with my left hand.

'Shall we play tennis or volleyball?' Debbie asked her sister. 

Debbie asked her sister if they_____________play tennis or valleyball.

"May I leave the table?' Samantha asked her parents. 

Samantha asked her parents if she_____________leave the table.

'Will our bus leave on time?' Mum asked the driver. 

Mum asked the driver whether our bus_____________leave on time.
